description: Create a 3D solid model of a Clevis Rod End (Fork Joint) in FreeCAD based on the DIN 71752 standard. The model consists of a cylindrical shank (Diameter 18mm, Length 20mm) aligned along the negative X-axis from X=-20 to X=0, and a fork head block (20mm X, 30mm Y, 30mm Z) extending from X=0 to X=20. The fork head must have a 12mm wide slot centered on the Y-axis (removing material between Y=-6 and Y=6) and a 10mm diameter through-hole with its axis parallel to the Y-axis located at X=10, Z=0. Save the resulting single solid object to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/clevis_rod_end.FCStd.
